cta.note: New patients: your first visit is a 90-minute comprehensive consultation including treatment ($120).
cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Book your initial consultation and take the first step toward better health.

items.answer: It depends on your condition. Acute issues may improve within 3-6 sessions, while chronic conditions typically require 10-15 or more treatments. We will create a personalized treatment plan during your first consultation and adjust it based on your progress.
items.question: How many treatments will I need?

items.answer: No, treatment packages are optional. You can always pay per visit. However, packages provide significant savings and are recommended for chronic conditions that require multiple sessions.
items.question: Are treatment packages required?

items.answer: For patients without insurance, we can discuss payment plan options case by case. Please contact us to discuss your situation.
items.question: Do you offer payment plans?

hero.title: Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Affordable, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care with flexible payment options.

items.name: Single Beauty Sculpt Session
includes: Suitable for cosmetic acupuncture or local contouring
items.description: Best for first-time experience or fine-tuning a specific area.

items.name: Advanced Beauty Sculpt Package (6hr)
items.bestFor: Facial lifting, visible wrinkle reduction, postpartum recovery
includes: Cosmetic acupuncture (lifting, wrinkle care, spot reduction)
items.description: Our most popular beauty and contouring package for focused facial or body improvement.

items.name: Ultimate Transformation Package (13hr)
items.bestFor: Full-body contouring, comprehensive anti-aging, long-term body maintenance
includes: Full beauty care: facial lifting and full-face plumping
Full-body contouring: breast lift, full-body skin tightening
Advanced options including intimate rejuvenation and stretch mark care
items.description: A complete mind-body transformation journey for full-body tightening and rejuvenation.

packages.title: Cosmetic Acupuncture, Weight Loss & Body Sculpt Packages
packages.subtitle: Combining Traditional Chinese Medicine wisdom with modern aesthetics to shape a naturally healthy body and appearance.

packages.title: Package Policy
packages.policy: Treatment packages must be used within the specified time period. Packages are non-refundable, but they can be transferred to immediate family members. If you need to pause your package due to extended illness or travel, please contact us.

lateArrival.title: Late Arrival
lateArrival.policy: Please arrive 5-10 minutes before your scheduled appointment. If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, we may need to shorten your treatment or reschedule, and the full fee may still apply.

cancellation.title: Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
cancellation.policy: We understand schedules can change. Please provide at least 24 hours notice if you need to cancel or reschedule. Late cancellations (less than 24 hours) or no-shows will be charged 50% of the treatment fee. Emergency exceptions apply.

hsa.title: HSA/FSA Eligible
hsa.description: All of our treatments are eligible for payment using Health Savings Accounts (HSA) and Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA). We provide detailed receipts for your records.

insurance.title: Insurance & Payment

insuranceInfo.title: Insurance Coverage
weProvide: Direct billing to insurance (for in-network plans)
whatToAsk: Does my plan include acupuncture benefits?
How many visits are covered each year?
What is my copay or coinsurance?
Do I need a referral from my primary care doctor?
insuranceInfo.description: Many insurance plans now include acupuncture coverage for certain conditions. Coverage varies by plan, so we recommend calling your insurance provider before your first visit to confirm benefits.

acceptedInsurance: Most major plans with acupuncture benefits

introduction.note: Invest in your health today - prevention costs far less than illness.
introduction.text: We believe healing should be affordable and accessible. Our pricing is straightforward with no hidden fees. We offer package discounts to make ongoing care more affordable.

items.name: Initial consultation &treatment
items.description: Comprehensive first-visit evaluation including health history intake and Traditional Chinese Medicine pattern diagnosis.

items.name: Follow up acupuncture session
items.notes: Package available: buy 10 sessions, get 1 free ($1200)
items.description: Standard acupuncture treatment. Discounted package options are available for better value per session.

items.name: Cupping therapy ( standalone)
items.description: Uses warming moxa therapy on selected points to support circulation, dispel cold, and strengthen overall balance.

items.name: Cupping therapy (add-on)
items.description: Deep warming and broad meridian release, especially suitable for cold-deficiency constitutions or chronic fatigue.

items.name: Gua Sha:(standalone)
items.notes: Promotes circulation and relieves local discomfort
items.description: Gua sha scraping along channels and points to improve qi-blood flow and release stagnation.

items.name: Gua she: (add-on)
items.notes: Improves circulation and relieves muscle tension
items.description: Negative-pressure cup therapy for deep muscle release and local circulation support.

items.name: Tui Na Medical Massage
items.description: Combines cupping and manual movement over the skin, ideal for back stiffness and heaviness.

items.name: Moxibustion
items.description: A focused bloodletting method used to clear heat, reduce swelling, and relieve specific acute symptoms.

items.name: Chinese herbal consultation
items.description: Customized herbal prescription based on pattern differentiation to support internal balance of organs and qi-blood.

items.name: Chinese herbal consultation with one weak herb

individualTreatments.title: Individual Treatment Pricing
individualTreatments.subtitle: All services are also available as pay-per-visit options.
